published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML + ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO + ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML: common EIF/product-rate corner follows from known orthogonal-score validity once common normalization is assumed

repo_prior_art.cite: Closest in-catalogue analogues eid_bjs_efficient_event_study quotient IF frontier, eid_lp_svar_nonequiv primitive non-equivalence, and pid_offline_policy_joint_misspec joint nuisance geometry are different clusters and do not cover unconfounded ATE DML/LRO/ADML spectral equivalence

published_prior_art.cite: none; closest checked DML/LRO/ADML/RR papers establish estimator-specific orthogonality or robustness, not an iff triple frontier
BrunsSmithDukesFellerOgburn2024ABW: algebraic equivalence for augmented balancing weights/AutoDML-style estimators, not a finite-support DML-LRO-ADML strict variance witness

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The closest Riesz-side survey is missing Chernozhukov-Newey-Quintas-Martinez-Syrgkanis 2024, Automatic Debiased Machine Learning via Riesz Regression, and Singh 2024, Kernel Ridge Riesz Representers; both are closer to the automatic Riesz/spectral instability channel than several checklist entries.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: With lambda_min^+(K_n) asymp n^{-2 kappa}, a_n=n^{1-2(r_g+r_p)}lambda_min^+(K_n) vanishes iff r_g+r_p>1/2-kappa; after defining rho_star=max(0,1/2-kappa), the claim that a_n vanishes exactly above the frontier is false at kappa>1/2 and r_g+r_p=0.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: K_n is called observable but is defined using pseudo-truth objects g_star, p_star and projection matrices Pi_D, Pi_L, Pi_A without an explicit observable construction or limit convention.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The estimator-specific quantities underline V_{m,n} are called local asymptotic variance lower bounds, but lower bounds are normally model/estimand objects; the proposal needs to define whether these are asymptotic variances, minimax risks, or tangent-cone lower envelopes.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Repair the frontier algebra by either dropping the max truncation and stating the condition as r_g+r_p>1/2-kappa, or explicitly restricting the flagship theorem to kappa<=1/2 and treating kappa>1/2 as an automatic-equivalence corollary.

Add a related-work paragraph comparing against Automatic Debiased Machine Learning via Riesz Regression and Kernel Ridge Riesz Representers, explaining why their Riesz estimation/effective-dimension results do not already imply the proposed triple estimator frontier.

Replace underline V_{m,n} with a precise object: pairwise asymptotic variance of the scaled remainder, local minimax risk over the tangent cone, or a named efficiency-bound functional, and restate the strict ordering in those terms.

Make K_n genuinely observable by defining the cross-fitted estimator, the limiting pseudo-truth convention, and the finite gap-coordinate selection rule before using lambda_min^+(K_n) as the diagnostic.

recommended_next_step: Patch the frontier scaling and observable-kernel definitions, then rerun Stage -0.5 before promoting to Stage 0.
